hero.subtitle: Chase the northern lights in real time with style and unmatched scientific precision.

features.title: Scientific Precision in real time.
features.description: The app uses the most reliable data streams on the planet to guarantee your observations.

items.title: NOAA/SWPC Data
items.description: Direct feeds from the Space Weather Prediction Center for unfiltered analysis.

items.title: Privacy First
items.description: We collect no personal data. Your browsing is 100% anonymous and secure.

items.title: Mapping
items.description: 3D visualisation of the auroral oval, OVATION model, Bz Bt charts and KP index

designFirst.title: Data science meets premium design.
designFirst.text: While the data is functional and comes straight from NOAA/SWPC, Aurorapp stands out with a modern, smooth and aesthetic interface.
designFirst.quote: It's not just data; it's a seamless experience designed for the modern explorer.

weather.title: Don't let clouds ruin your view.
weather.description: Combining weather data and auroral predictions is the key to success. Aurorapp integrates OpenWeatherMap feeds to give you a complete view of the local sky.
weather.quoteText: Find the best observation windows by correlating the Kp index with real-time cloud cover.

items.title: Forecasts
items.description: Plan your expeditions with detailed hourly and daily forecasts for every spot.

items.title: Cloud Cover
items.description: Crucial data: track cloud evolution in real time to find a clear sky.

items.title: Practical Data
items.description: Sunrise/sunset times, wind speed and humidity to prepare your gear.

testimonial.quote: The indispensable tool for your photography and travels in northern countries

callToAction.title: Ready for the show?
callToAction.subtitle: Join thousands of enthusiasts and never miss a northern lights display again.

footer.copyright: © 2026 Aurorapp - Northern Lights. Data powered by SWPC, NOAA.
